title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Airtel India Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About Airtel India Capital India:
Airtel India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India Capital India!
